title: cineraria ramosa
intro: Cineraria ramosa, also known as the Baboon Flower or Cape Marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections due to its high levels of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Cineraria ramosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions. Cineraria ramosa is often prepared as a tincture or tea, and it can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
